description_long: This is a striking blue Audi sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a sleek, aggressive stance. The front features a wide black grille with the Audi logo, angular headlights, and sculpted hood lines. The sides display prominent air intakes, black accent panels, and flush door handles, while the roofline flows smoothly into the rear. The rear is characterized by sharp taillights, a subtle integrated spoiler, and a black lower diffuser. The car sits on large, silver five-spoke alloy wheels with visible red brake calipers, enhancing its performance-oriented look. The windows are tinted black, and the overall design emphasizes speed, luxury, and modern engineering.
description: A blue Audi sports car with a low, aerodynamic body, black accents, and five-spoke alloy wheels. It features sharp headlights, a wide grille, and a sleek, performance-driven design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide black grille, Audi logo, angular headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth roofline, black side panel, flush door handle, and five-spoke alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying sharp taillights, subtle integrated spoiler, black lower diffuser, and Audi badging.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible air intake, black accent panel, and alloy wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: five-spoke alloy wheels with a split-spoke design and visible red brake calipers
